# SKParticleRenderOrder.oldestLast

**Case**

The particles are rendered from newest to oldest. This is the default value.

## Declaration

```swift
case oldestLast
```

## Constants

- **SKParticleRenderOrder.oldestFirst**: The particles are rendered from oldest to newest.
- **SKParticleRenderOrder.dontCare**: The particles can be rendered in any order. SpriteKit may choose to reorder the particles to improve rendering performance.
